message:
test(core): property-based tests for backpressure 4-tier FSM (wa-07if)

32 proptest properties verifying BackpressureTier ordering/serde,
QueueDepths ratio bounds, classify() monotonicity and Black saturation,
evaluate() immediate upgrades + hysteresis downgrades, pane pause set
semantics, BackpressureConfig/Snapshot serde roundtrips, config
accessors, and transition counting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
